allow: PowerShell($env:PGPASSWORD = 'verigood_admin_2026'; $psql = 'C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\17\\bin\\psql.exe'; & $psql -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -c "CREATE ROLE verigood WITH LOGIN PASSWORD 'verigood_dev_2026';" 2>&1; & $psql -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -c "CREATE DATABASE verigood_db OWNER verigood;" 2>&1; & $psql -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -c "GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON DATABASE verigood_db TO verigood;" 2>&1; & $psql -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d verigood_db -c "GRANT ALL ON SCHEMA public TO verigood;" 2>&1)

PowerShell($bytes1 = New-Object byte[] 48; $bytes2 = New-Object byte[] 48; [System.Security.Cryptography.RandomNumberGenerator]::Create\(\).GetBytes\($bytes1\); [System.Security.Cryptography.RandomNumberGenerator]::Create\(\).GetBytes\($bytes2\); $jwt = [Convert]::ToBase64String\($bytes1\) -replace '/','_' -replace '\\+','-' -replace '=',''; $jwtR = [Convert]::ToBase64String\($bytes2\) -replace '/','_' -replace '\\+','-' -replace '=',''; Write-Output "JWT_SECRET=$jwt"; Write-Output "JWT_REFRESH_SECRET=$jwtR")

PowerShell($env:PGPASSWORD = 'verigood_dev_2026'; $psql = 'C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\17\\bin\\psql.exe'; Write-Output "=== migrations ==="; & $psql -U verigood -h localhost -p 5432 -d verigood_db -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -f "K:\\Apps\\verigood\\backend\\src\\migrations\\001_initial_schema.sql" 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 30)

PowerShell($env:PGPASSWORD = 'verigood_dev_2026'; $psql = 'C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\17\\bin\\psql.exe'; Write-Output "=== seeds ==="; & $psql -U verigood -h localhost -p 5432 -d verigood_db -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -f "K:\\Apps\\verigood\\backend\\src\\seeds\\002_demo_data.sql" 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 30; Write-Output "=== verify users ==="; & $psql -U verigood -h localhost -p 5432 -d verigood_db -c "SELECT email, role FROM users;" 2>&1)

PowerShell($env:PGPASSWORD = 'verigood_dev_2026'; $psql = 'C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\17\\bin\\psql.exe'; $hash = '$2a$12$QltKDRsf7vxuOB6l8hm1tuZsdzAgN8coMuUGaUQcarx4nT.hP3Fdq'; & $psql -U verigood -h localhost -p 5432 -d verigood_db -c "UPDATE users SET password_hash = '$hash';" 2>&1; & $psql -U verigood -h localhost -p 5432 -d verigood_db -c "SELECT email, role, LEFT\(password_hash, 20\) AS hash_prefix FROM users;" 2>&1)

PowerShell($frontendPath = "K:\\Apps\\verigood\\frontend"; Start-Process -FilePath "cmd.exe" -ArgumentList "/c","cd /d $frontendPath && npx vite > vite.log 2>&1" -WindowStyle Hidden; Write-Output "vite started in background")
